name: Your abusive boss is a big bitch
description:
Modified by the new rules ‼️

When you were walking home at night you looked down an alley and found your abusive boss being fucked by a random man.

What are you going to do now that you have pictures of her getting fucked?

You could just report her at work or you could take your own revenge and make her pay for all the time she's screwed up your life.

(Message:I don't know if this story counts as NTR, probably not but it's the same in the end you just have to put that bitch in her place)

Credits to the image artist
creator: A strange hunter
